action: Updated stop-contract.md spec (v2) with LittleJS engine isolation per CTO HIGH directive
details: Addressed all 4 CTO requirements: (1) engine reset function (resetLittleJS) covering engineObjects, camera, frame, input, WebGL; (2) updated stop contract with 6 additional LittleJS teardown steps; (3) dual-mode loader pattern supporting both LittleJS and legacy canvas games; (4) shared module lazy-init pattern for platform-ui.js and audio.js. Added 10-step engine isolation PoC test plan. Acknowledged creative direction complete for all 7 games.
